title: Why I never trust fully generated Code
summary: JavaScript Mastery discusses skepticism toward fully AI-generated code. The video explores reasons for caution when relying entirely on code generation without human review and validation.
writeup: JavaScript Mastery lays out a case for skepticism toward fully AI-generated code, arguing that complete reliance on code generation without human review carries risk. The discussion centers on why validation matters and where unreviewed output can fall short on robustness. The takeaway is that generated code warrants human review and validation rather than blind trust.
